<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\SPEC.md`

```text
1	# 智能编程学习助手 - 需求规格说明书
2	
3	## 项目名称
4	
5	基于 Vue3 + Spring Boot + Redis + 知识图谱与 LLM 的智能编程学习助手
6	
7	---
8	
9	## 一、功能需求
10	
11	### 1. 智能问答
12	
13	- **描述**: 用户输入编程问题（如"Spring Boot 如何整合 Redis？"），系统从知识库中检索并生成精准答案，附带相关代码示例和原理说明。
14	- **核心流程**:
15	  1. 用户输入自然语言问题
16	  2. 系统通过向量检索（RAG）从知识库中召回相关文档/知识片段
17	  3. 将召回内容作为上下文，调用 LLM 生成结构化回答
18	  4. 返回答案，包含：文字解释 + 代码示例 + 原理说明
19	- **关键要求**:
20	  - 支持多轮对话，保持上下文连贯
21	  - 代码示例需语法高亮、可复制
22	  - 答案需标注知识来源（出自哪个知识点/文档）
23	  - 支持对答案的反馈（有用/无用），用于优化检索质量
24	
25	### 2. 知识图谱导航
26	
27	- **描述**: 可视化展示编程知识点（如 Java、Spring、数据库）之间的关联、依赖关系，帮助用户构建系统化知识体系。
28	- **核心流程**:
29	  1. 后端从 Neo4j 查询知识图谱数据（节点 + 关系）
30	  2. 前端使用 ECharts/G6 渲染可交互的图谱
31	  3. 用户点击节点可查看知识详情、跳转相关问答
32	- **关键要求**:
33	  - 支持缩放、拖拽、搜索定位
34	  - 节点分类着色（如：语言、框架、数据库、工具等）
35	  - 支持按知识领域/标签筛选子图
36	  - 点击节点可展开关联节点（懒加载）
37	  - 显示节点间关系类型（如：依赖、包含、前置知识等）
38	
39	### 3. 个性化学习路径
40	
41	- **描述**: 根据用户当前水平和发展目标，智能推荐学习路线和资源。
42	- **核心流程**:
43	  1. 用户填写自评问卷或通过测试题评估当前水平
44	  2. 用户设置学习目标（如：掌握 Spring Cloud 微服务开发）
45	  3. 系统结合知识图谱的拓扑结构 + 用户已掌握知识，生成推荐路径
46	  4. 路径以有序节点列表形式展示，每个节点关联学习资源
47	- **关键要求**:
48	  - 路径可视化展示（路线图/流程图形式）
49	  - 标记已完成/进行中/未开始状态
50	  - 支持路径调整（用户可跳过已掌握的知识点）
51	  - 每个节点关联推荐资源（文档、视频、练习题等）
52	
53	### 4. 代码片段管理与推荐
54	
55	- **描述**: 用户可保存常用代码片段，系统可根据上下文智能推荐相关代码。
56	- **核心流程**:
57	  1. 用户手动保存代码片段（标题 + 代码 + 标签 + 描述）
58	  2. 问答过程中，系统根据当前话题自动推荐用户已收藏或公共代码片段
59	  3. 支持代码片段的搜索、分类管理
60	- **关键要求**:
61	  - 支持多语言代码高亮（Java, Python, SQL, JavaScript 等）
62	  - 支持标签分类和全文搜索
63	  - 支持代码片段的导入/导出
64	  - 智能推荐基于当前问答上下文 + 用户历史使用频率
65	
66	### 5. 学习进度跟踪
67	
68	- **描述**: 记录用户问答历史、学习轨迹，生成学习报告。
69	- **核心流程**:
70	  1. 自动记录用户每次问答、浏览知识图谱、完成学习路径节点等行为
71	  2. 生成学习统计数据（每日/每周活跃度、知识覆盖率等）
72	  3. 定期生成学习报告
73	- **关键要求**:
74	  - 仪表盘展示：学习天数、问答次数、知识掌握比例等
75	  - 学习热力图（类似 GitHub Contribution Graph）
76	  - 知识掌握雷达图（按知识领域维度）
77	  - 学习报告支持导出（PDF）
78	
79	---
80	
81	## 二、技术架构
82	
83	### 前端
84	
85	| 技术 | 用途 |
86	|------|------|
87	| Vue 3 | 前端框架（Composition API） |
88	| Vite | 构建工具 |
89	| Element Plus | UI 组件库 |
90	| ECharts / AntV G6 | 知识图谱可视化 |
91	| Monaco Editor / CodeMirror | 代码编辑器/代码高亮 |
92	| Pinia | 状态管理 |
93	| Vue Router | 路由管理 |
94	| Axios | HTTP 请求 |
95	
96	### 后端
97	
98	| 技术 | 用途 |
99	|------|------|
100	| Spring Boot | 后端框架 |
101	| Spring Security | 认证与授权（JWT） |
102	| MyBatis-Plus | ORM / 数据访问层 |
103	| Spring AI / RestTemplate | 调用 LLM API |
104	
105	### AI 与数据
106	
107	| 技术 | 用途 |
108	|------|------|
109	| OpenAI GPT-4 API / ChatGLM3 / Qwen | 大模型（智能问答生成） |
110	| Neo4j | 知识图谱存储（图数据库） |
111	| （后续扩展）Elasticsearch / Milvus | 向量检索，实现 RAG 架构（当前版本暂不引入） |
112	
113	### 数据存储
114	
115	| 技术 | 用途 |
116	|------|------|
117	| MySQL | 用户数据、会话记录、代码片段、学习进度 |
118	
119	### 部署
120	
121	| 技术 | 用途 |
122	|------|------|
123	| Docker | 容器化部署 |
124	| Docker Compose | 多服务编排 |
125	| Nginx | 前端静态资源 + 反向代理 |
126	
127	---
128	
129	## 三、系统模块划分
130	
131	```
132	intelligent-coding-assistant/
133	├── frontend/                  # 前端 (Vue3 + Vite)
134	│   ├── src/
135	│   │   ├── views/
136	│   │   │   ├── Chat/          # 智能问答页面
137	│   │   │   ├── KnowledgeGraph/# 知识图谱页面
138	│   │   │   ├── LearningPath/  # 学习路径页面
139	│   │   │   ├── CodeSnippets/  # 代码片段管理页面
140	│   │   │   ├── Dashboard/     # 学习进度仪表盘
141	│   │   │   ├── Auth/          # 登录/注册
142	│   │   │   └── Profile/       # 用户中心
143	│   │   ├── components/        # 公共组件
144	│   │   ├── api/               # API 接口封装
145	│   │   ├── store/             # Pinia 状态管理
146	│   │   ├── router/            # 路由配置
147	│   │   └── utils/             # 工具函数
148	│   └── ...
149	│
150	├── backend/                   # 后端 (Spring Boot)
151	│   ├── src/main/java/
152	│   │   ├── controller/        # 接口层
153	│   │   ├── service/           # 业务逻辑层
154	│   │   ├── mapper/            # MyBatis-Plus Mapper
155	│   │   ├── entity/            # 数据实体
156	│   │   ├── dto/               # 数据传输对象
157	│   │   ├── config/            # 配置类 (Security, Redis, Neo4j 等)
158	│   │   ├── ai/                # AI 相关 (LLM 调用, RAG 流程)
159	│   │   └── graph/             # 知识图谱相关服务
160	│   └── ...
161	│
162	├── docker/                    # Docker 配置
163	│   ├── docker-compose.yml
164	│   ├── mysql/

166	│   └── nginx/
167	│
168	└── docs/                      # 项目文档

170	
171	---
172	
173	## 四、核心数据模型
174	
175	### MySQL 表设计（概要）
176	
177	| 表名 | 说明 | 核心字段 |
178	|------|------|----------|
179	| `user` | 用户表 | id, username, password, email, avatar, level, created_at |
180	| `conversation` | 会话表 | id, user_id, title, created_at, updated_at |
181	| `message` | 消息表 | id, conversation_id, role(user/assistant), content, created_at |
182	| `code_snippet` | 代码片段表 | id, user_id, title, code, language, description, tags, created_at |
183	| `learning_path` | 学习路径表 | id, user_id, target, status, created_at |
184	| `learning_node` | 路径节点表 | id, path_id, knowledge_id, order, status(done/doing/todo) |
185	| `learning_record` | 学习记录表 | id, user_id, action_type, target_id, created_at |
186	| `feedback` | 反馈表 | id, message_id, user_id, rating(useful/useless), comment |
187	
188	### Neo4j 节点与关系
189	
190	**节点类型**:
191	- `Knowledge`: 知识点（name, category, description, difficulty）
192	- `Resource`: 学习资源（title, url, type）
193	
194	**关系类型**:
195	- `DEPENDS_ON`: 前置知识依赖
196	- `CONTAINS`: 包含子知识点
197	- `RELATED_TO`: 关联知识
198	- `HAS_RESOURCE`: 知识点关联资源
199	
200	---
201	
202	## 五、核心 API 设计（概要）
203	
204	### 认证模块
205	- `POST /api/auth/register` - 用户注册
206	- `POST /api/auth/login` - 用户登录
207	- `POST /api/auth/logout` - 用户登出
208	
209	### 智能问答模块
210	- `POST /api/chat/send` - 发送问题（支持流式响应 SSE）
211	- `GET /api/chat/conversations` - 获取会话列表
212	- `GET /api/chat/conversations/{id}/messages` - 获取会话消息
213	- `DELETE /api/chat/conversations/{id}` - 删除会话
214	- `POST /api/chat/feedback` - 提交答案反馈
215	
216	### 知识图谱模块
217	- `GET /api/graph/overview` - 获取图谱概览数据
218	- `GET /api/graph/node/{id}` - 获取节点详情
219	- `GET /api/graph/node/{id}/neighbors` - 获取关联节点
220	- `GET /api/graph/search?keyword=xxx` - 搜索知识点
221	
222	### 学习路径模块
223	- `POST /api/path/generate` - 生成学习路径
224	- `GET /api/path/list` - 获取用户路径列表
225	- `PUT /api/path/node/{id}/status` - 更新节点学习状态
226	
227	### 代码片段模块
228	- `POST /api/snippets` - 保存代码片段
229	- `GET /api/snippets` - 获取片段列表（支持搜索/标签过滤）
230	- `GET /api/snippets/recommend` - 根据上下文推荐代码片段
231	- `PUT /api/snippets/{id}` - 更新片段
232	- `DELETE /api/snippets/{id}` - 删除片段
233	
234	### 学习进度模块
235	- `GET /api/progress/dashboard` - 获取仪表盘数据
236	- `GET /api/progress/heatmap` - 获取学习热力图数据
237	- `GET /api/progress/radar` - 获取知识雷达图数据
238	- `GET /api/progress/report` - 生成学习报告
239	
240	---
241	
242	## 六、非功能需求
243	
244	| 项目 | 要求 |
245	|------|------|
246	| 性能 | 问答响应首 token < 2s（流式），图谱渲染 < 1s（500 节点内） |
247	| 并发 | 支持 100+ 并发用户 |
248	| 安全 | JWT 认证，XSS/CSRF 防护，密码加密存储 |
249	| 可用性 | 响应式布局，支持移动端基本浏览 |
250	| 可扩展 | LLM 提供者可切换（OpenAI / 本地模型），向量库可替换 |
251
```
</details></tool-use>

26	@Slf4j
27	@Service
28	@RequiredArgsConstructor
29	public class PathService {
30	
31	    private final LearningPathMapper learningPathMapper;
32	    private final LearningNodeMapper learningNodeMapper;
33	    private final Driver neo4jDriver;
34	    private final ChatService chatService;  // 使用 ChatService 代替 LLMService
35	
36	    @Transactional
37	    public LearningPathVO generate(Long userId, PathGenerateRequest request) {
38	        Set<String> knownIds = request.getKnownKnowledgeIds() != null ?
39	                new HashSet<>(request.getKnownKnowledgeIds()) : new HashSet<>();
40	
41	        // Query Neo4j for dependency graph related to target
42	        List<Map<String, String>> dependencies = new ArrayList<>();
43	        Map<String, String> nodeNames = new HashMap<>();
44	
45	        try (Session session = neo4jDriver.session()) {
46	            // Find nodes related to the target topic
47	            String cypher = "MATCH (target:Knowledge) " +
48	                    "WHERE toLower(target.name) CONTAINS toLower($target) " +
49	                    "WITH target " +
50	                    "MATCH path = (target)-[:DEPENDS_ON*0..5]->(dep:Knowledge) " +
51	                    "UNWIND nodes(path) as n " +
52	                    "WITH DISTINCT n " +
53	                    "OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(prereq:Knowledge) " +
54	                    "RETURN n.id as nodeId, n.name as nodeName, prereq.id as prereqId";
55	
56	            Result result = session.run(cypher, Values.parameters("target", request.getTarget()));
57	
58	            while (result.hasNext()) {
59	                Record record = result.next();
60	                String nodeId = record.get("nodeId").isNull() ? null : record.get("nodeId").asString();
61	                String nodeName = record.get("nodeName").isNull() ? "" : record.get("nodeName").asString();
62	                String prereqId = record.get("prereqId").isNull() ? null : record.get("prereqId").asString();
63	
64	                if (nodeId != null) {
65	                    nodeNames.put(nodeId, nodeName);
66	                    if (prereqId != null) {
67	                        Map<String, String> dep = new HashMap<>();
68	                        dep.put("from", prereqId);
69	                        dep.put("to", nodeId);
70	                        dependencies.add(dep);
71	                    }
72	                }
73	            }
74	        } catch (Exception e) {
75	            log.error("Error querying Neo4j for learning path: {}", e.getMessage());
76	        }
77	
78	        // Topological sort excluding known nodes
79	        List<String> sortedNodes = topologicalSort(nodeNames.keySet(), dependencies);
80	        sortedNodes.removeAll(knownIds);
81	
82	        // 如果知识图谱中没有找到节点，使用 AI 生成
83	        if (sortedNodes.isEmpty()) {
84	            log.info("No nodes found in knowledge graph for target '{}', using AI generation", request.getTarget());
85	            return generateByAI(userId, request);
86	        }
87	
88	        // Save learning path
89	        LearningPath path = LearningPath.builder()
90	                .userId(userId)
91	                .target(request.getTarget())
92	                .status("active")
93	                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
94	                .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())
95	                .build();
96	        learningPathMapper.insert(path);
97	
98	        // Save learning nodes
99	        List<LearningNodeVO> nodeVOs = new ArrayList<>();
100	        for (int i = 0; i < sortedNodes.size(); i++) {
101	            String knowledgeId = sortedNodes.get(i);
102	            LearningNode node = LearningNode.builder()
103	                    .pathId(path.getId())
104	                    .knowledgeId(knowledgeId)
105	                    .nodeOrder(i + 1)
106	                    .status("todo")
107	                    .build();
108	            learningNodeMapper.insert(node);
109	
110	            nodeVOs.add(LearningNodeVO.builder()
111	                    .id(node.getId())
112	                    .knowledgeId(knowledgeId)
113	                    .knowledgeName(nodeNames.getOrDefault(knowledgeId, knowledgeId))
114	                    .nodeOrder(i + 1)
115	                    .status("todo")
116	                    .resourceUrls(List.of())
117	                    .build());
118	        }
119	
120	        log.info("Learning path generated for user {} with target '{}', {} nodes", userId, request.getTarget(), sortedNodes.size());
121	
122	        return LearningPathVO.builder()
123	                .id(path.getId())
124	                .target(path.getTarget())
125	                .status(path.getStatus())
126	                .nodes(nodeVOs)
127	                .createdAt(path.getCreatedAt())
128	                .build();
129	    }
130	
131	    /**
132	     * 使用 AI 生成学习路径
133	     */
134	    private LearningPathVO generateByAI(Long userId, PathGenerateRequest request) {
135	        try {
136	            // 构建 AI prompt
137	            String prompt = buildPrompt(request.getTarget(), request.getKnownKnowledgeIds());
138	
139	            log.info("Calling AI to generate learning path for target: {}", request.getTarget());
140	
141	            // 使用 ChatService 调用 AI
142	            String aiResponse = chatService.generateLearningPath(prompt);
143	
144	            if (aiResponse == null || aiResponse.isEmpty()) {
145	                throw new BusinessException(400, "无法生成学习路径，请尝试其他学习目标");
146	            }
147	
148	            log.info("AI response received, length: {}", aiResponse.length());
149	
150	            // 解析 AI 返回的节点列表
151	            List<String> aiNodes = parseAIGeneratedNodes(aiResponse);
152	
153	            if (aiNodes.isEmpty()) {
154	                log.warn("No nodes parsed from AI response: {}", aiResponse);
155	                throw new BusinessException(400, "无法生成学习路径，请尝试其他学习目标");
156	            }
157	
158	            // 保存学习路径
159	            LearningPath path = LearningPath.builder()
160	                    .userId(userId)
161	                    .target(request.getTarget())
162	                    .status("active")
163	                    .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
164	                    .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())
165	                    .build();
166	            learningPathMapper.insert(path);
167	
168	            // 保存学习节点
169	List<LearningNodeVO> nodeVOs = new ArrayList<>();
170	for (int i = 0; i < aiNodes.size(); i++) {
171	    String nodeName = aiNodes.get(i);
172	    // 生成一个虚拟的 knowledgeId
173	    String knowledgeId = "ai_" + UUID.randomUUID().toString().substring(0, 8);
174	
175	    LearningNode node = LearningNode.builder()
176	            .pathId(path.getId())
177	            .knowledgeId(knowledgeId)
178	            .customName(nodeName)  // 保存原始名称
179	            .nodeOrder(i + 1)
180	            .status("todo")
181	            .build();
182	    learningNodeMapper.insert(node);
183	
184	    nodeVOs.add(LearningNodeVO.builder()
185	            .id(node.getId())
186	            .knowledgeId(knowledgeId)
187	            .knowledgeName(nodeName)  // 直接使用原始名称
188	            .nodeOrder(i + 1)
189	            .status("todo")
190	            .resourceUrls(List.of())
191	            .build());
192	}
193	
194	            log.info("AI generated learning path for user {} with target '{}', {} nodes", userId, request.getTarget(), aiNodes.size());
195	
196	            return LearningPathVO.builder()
197	                    .id(path.getId())
198	                    .target(path.getTarget())
199	                    .status(path.getStatus())
200	                    .nodes(nodeVOs)
201	                    .createdAt(path.getCreatedAt())
202	                    .build();
203	
204	        } catch (BusinessException e) {
205	            throw e;
206	        } catch (Exception e) {
207	            log.error("AI generation failed: {}", e.getMessage(), e);
208	            throw new BusinessException(400, "No learning nodes found for the given target");
209	        }
210	    }

212	    /**
213	     * 构建 AI prompt
214	     */
215	    private String buildPrompt(String target, List<String> knownKnowledgeIds) {
216	        StringBuilder prompt = new StringBuilder();
217	        prompt.append("你是一个编程学习专家。请为以下学习目标生成一个详细的学习路径：\n\n");
218	        prompt.append("学习目标：").append(target).append("\n\n");
219	
220	        if (knownKnowledgeIds != null && !knownKnowledgeIds.isEmpty()) {
221	            prompt.append("用户已掌握的知识：").append(String.join("、", knownKnowledgeIds)).append("\n\n");
222	        }
223	
224	        prompt.append("请生成一个包含5-8个学习节点的学习路径，每个节点应该是一个具体的学习主题。\n");
225	        prompt.append("节点应该从基础到高级，循序渐进。\n\n");
226	        prompt.append("请严格按照以下JSON数组格式返回，不要有任何其他内容：\n");
227	        prompt.append("[\"节点1\", \"节点2\", \"节点3\", \"节点4\", \"节点5\"]\n\n");
228	        prompt.append("注意：只返回JSON数组，不要包含解释、说明或其他文字。");
229	
230	        return prompt.toString();
231	    }
232	
233	    /**
234	     * 解析 AI 返回的 JSON 数组
235	     */
236	    private List<String> parseAIGeneratedNodes(String aiResponse) {
237	        List<String> nodes = new ArrayList<>();
238	        try {
239	            // 清理响应内容，移除可能的 markdown 代码块标记
240	            String cleaned = aiResponse.trim();
241	            if (cleaned.startsWith("```json")) {
242	                cleaned = cleaned.substring(7);
243	            }
244	            if (cleaned.startsWith("```")) {
245	                cleaned = cleaned.substring(3);
246	            }
247	            if (cleaned.endsWith("```")) {
248	                cleaned = cleaned.substring(0, cleaned.length() - 3);
249	            }
250	            cleaned = cleaned.trim();
251	
252	            // 尝试提取 JSON 数组
253	            int start = cleaned.indexOf('[');
254	            int end = cleaned.lastIndexOf(']');
255	            if (start != -1 && end != -1 && start < end) {
256	                String jsonArray = cleaned.substring(start, end + 1);
257	                com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper mapper = new com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper();
258	                nodes = mapper.readValue(jsonArray, mapper.getTypeFactory().constructCollectionType(List.class, String.class));
259	                log.info("Parsed {} nodes from AI response", nodes.size());
260	            } else {
261	                log.warn("No JSON array found in AI response: {}", cleaned.substring(0, Math.min(200, cleaned.length())));
262	            }
263	        } catch (Exception e) {
264	            log.warn("Failed to parse AI response: {}", e.getMessage());
265	        }
266	        return nodes;
267	    }
268	
269	    public List<LearningPathVO> list(Long userId) {
270	        List<LearningPath> paths = learningPathMapper.selectList(
271	                new LambdaQueryWrapper<LearningPath>()
272	                        .eq(LearningPath::getUserId, userId)
273	                        .orderByDesc(LearningPath::getCreatedAt)
274	        );
275	
276	        return paths.stream().map(path -> {
277	            List<LearningNode> nodes = learningNodeMapper.selectByPathId(path.getId());
278	            List<LearningNodeVO> nodeVOs = nodes.stream()
279	                    .map(this::toLearningNodeVO)
280	                    .collect(Collectors.toList());
281	
282	            return LearningPathVO.builder()
283	                    .id(path.getId())
284	                    .target(path.getTarget())
285	                    .status(path.getStatus())
286	                    .nodes(nodeVOs)
287	                    .createdAt(path.getCreatedAt())
288	                    .build();
289	        }).collect(Collectors.toList());
290	    }
291	
292	    @Transactional
293	public void deletePath(Long userId, Long pathId) {
294	    LearningPath path = learningPathMapper.selectById(pathId);
295	    if (path == null) {
296	        throw new BusinessException(404, "学习路径不存在");
297	    }
298	    if (!path.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
299	        throw new BusinessException(403, "无权删除此学习路径");
300	    }
301	    learningNodeMapper.deleteByPathId(pathId);
302	    learningPathMapper.deleteById(pathId);
303	    log.info("Learning path {} deleted by user {}", pathId, userId);
304	}
305	@Transactional
306	public void updateNodeStatus(Long userId, Long nodeId, String status) {
307	    LearningNode node = learningNodeMapper.selectById(nodeId);
308	    if (node == null) {
309	        throw new BusinessException(404, "学习节点不存在");
310	    }
311	    
312	    LearningPath path = learningPathMapper.selectById(node.getPathId());
313	    if (path == null || !path.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
314	        throw new BusinessException(403, "无权修改此节点");
315	    }
316	    
317	    node.setStatus(status);
318	    learningNodeMapper.updateById(node);
319	    
320	    path.setUpdatedAt(LocalDateTime.now());
321	    learningPathMapper.updateById(path);
322	    
323	    log.info("Learning node {} status updated to '{}' by user {}", nodeId, status, userId);
324	}
325	       
326	
327	
328	    private List<String> topologicalSort(Set<String> allNodes, List<Map<String, String>> dependencies) {
329	        Map<String, Set<String>> adjList = new HashMap<>();
330	        Map<String, Integer> inDegree = new HashMap<>();
331	
332	        for (String node : allNodes) {
333	            adjList.put(node, new HashSet<>());
334	            inDegree.put(node, 0);
335	        }
336	
337	        for (Map<String, String> dep : dependencies) {
338	            String from = dep.get("from");
339	            String to = dep.get("to");
340	            if (allNodes.contains(from) && allNodes.contains(to)) {
341	                adjList.get(from).add(to);
342	                inDegree.merge(to, 1, Integer::sum);
343	            }
344	        }
345	
346	        Queue<String> queue = new LinkedList<>();
347	        for (Map.Entry<String, Integer> entry : inDegree.entrySet()) {
348	            if (entry.getValue() == 0) {
349	                queue.add(entry.getKey());
350	            }
351	        }
352	
353	        List<String> sorted = new ArrayList<>();
354	        while (!queue.isEmpty()) {
355	            String node = queue.poll();
356	            sorted.add(node);
357	            for (String neighbor : adjList.getOrDefault(node, Set.of())) {
358	                int newDegree = inDegree.get(neighbor) - 1;
359	                inDegree.put(neighbor, newDegree);
360	                if (newDegree == 0) {
361	                    queue.add(neighbor);
362	                }
363	            }
364	        }
365	
366	        // Add any remaining nodes (circular deps)
367	        for (String node : allNodes) {
368	            if (!sorted.contains(node)) {
369	                sorted.add(node);
370	            }
371	        }
372	
373	        return sorted;
374	    }
375	
376	 private LearningNodeVO toLearningNodeVO(LearningNode node) {
377	    List<String> urls = new ArrayList<>();
378	    if (node.getResourceUrls() != null && !node.getResourceUrls().isEmpty()) {
379	        try {
380	            com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper mapper = new com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper();
381	            urls = mapper.readValue(node.getResourceUrls(),
382	                    mapper.getTypeFactory().constructCollectionType(List.class, String.class));
383	        } catch (Exception e) {
384	            log.warn("Failed to parse resource URLs for node {}: {}", node.getId(), e.getMessage());
385	        }
386	    }
387	
388	    // 获取知识名称
389	    String knowledgeName;
390	    
391	    // 如果是 AI 生成的节点，使用 customName
392	    if (node.getKnowledgeId() != null && node.getKnowledgeId().startsWith("ai_") && node.getCustomName() != null) {
393	        knowledgeName = node.getCustomName();
394	    } else {
395	        knowledgeName = getKnowledgeName(node.getKnowledgeId());
396	    }
397	
398	    return LearningNodeVO.builder()
399	            .id(node.getId())
400	            .knowledgeId(node.getKnowledgeId())
401	            .knowledgeName(knowledgeName)
402	            .nodeOrder(node.getNodeOrder())
403	            .status(node.getStatus())
404	            .resourceUrls(urls)
405	            .build();
406	}
407	
408	    private String getKnowledgeName(String knowledgeId) {
409	        // 如果是 AI 生成的虚拟 ID，直接返回 ID 作为名称
410	        if (knowledgeId != null && knowledgeId.startsWith("ai_")) {
411	            return knowledgeId;
412	        }
413	
414	        try (Session session = neo4jDriver.session()) {
415	            String cypher = "MATCH (n:Knowledge {id: $id}) RETURN n.name as name";
416	            Result result = session.run(cypher, Values.parameters("id", knowledgeId));
417	            if (result.hasNext()) {
418	                return result.next().get("name").asString();
419	            }
420	        } catch (Exception e) {
421	            log.warn("Failed to get knowledge name for id {}: {}", knowledgeId, e.getMessage());
422	        }
423	        return knowledgeId;
424	    }
425	}

31	                .defaultHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + config.getApiKey())
32	                .defaultHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
33	                .codecs(configurer -> configurer.defaultCodecs().maxInMemorySize(10 * 1024 * 1024))
34	                .build();
35	    }
36	
37	    @Override
38	    public Flux<String> chatStream(List<ChatMessage> messages, String systemPrompt) {
39	        ObjectNode requestBody = buildRequestBody(messages, systemPrompt, true);
40	
41	        return webClient.post()
42	                .uri("/api/paas/v4/chat/completions")
43	                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
44	                .bodyValue(requestBody.toString())
45	                .retrieve()
46	                .bodyToFlux(String.class)
47	                .filter(data -> !data.equals("[DONE]"))
48	                .map(data -> {
49	                    try {
50	                        JsonNode node = objectMapper.readTree(data);
51	                        JsonNode delta = node.path("choices").path(0).path("delta").path("content");
52	                        return delta.isMissingNode() ? "" : delta.asText();
53	                    } catch (Exception e) {
54	                        log.error("Error parsing ChatGLM SSE data: {}", e.getMessage());
55	                        return "";
56	                    }
57	                })
58	                .filter(s -> !s.isEmpty());
59	    }
60	
61	    @Override
62	    public String chat(List<ChatMessage> messages, String systemPrompt) {
63	        ObjectNode requestBody = buildRequestBody(messages, systemPrompt, false);
64	
65	        String responseBody = webClient.post()
66	                .uri("/api/paas/v4/chat/completions")
67	                .contentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
68	                .bodyValue(requestBody.toString())
69	                .retrieve()
70	                .bodyToMono(String.class)
71	                .block();
72	
73	        try {
74	            JsonNode node = objectMapper.readTree(responseBody);
75	            return node.path("choices").path(0).path("message").path("content").asText();
76	        } catch (Exception e) {
77	            log.error("Error parsing ChatGLM response: {}", e.getMessage());
78	            return "Sorry, an error occurred while processing your request.";
79	        }
80	    }
81	
82	    private ObjectNode buildRequestBody(List<ChatMessage> messages, String systemPrompt, boolean stream) {
83	        ObjectNode root = objectMapper.createObjectNode();
84	        root.put("model", config.getModel());
85	        root.put("stream", stream);
86	
87	        ArrayNode messagesArray = root.putArray("messages");
88	
89	        if (systemPrompt != null && !systemPrompt.isEmpty()) {
90	            ObjectNode systemMsg = objectMapper.createObjectNode();
91	            systemMsg.put("role", "system");
92	            systemMsg.put("content", systemPrompt);
93	            messagesArray.add(systemMsg);
94	        }
95	
96	        for (ChatMessage msg : messages) {
97	            ObjectNode msgNode = objectMapper.createObjectNode();
98	            msgNode.put("role", msg.getRole());
99	            msgNode.put("content", msg.getContent());
100	            messagesArray.add(msgNode);
101	        }
102	
103	        return root;
104	    }
105	}
```
</details></tool-use>

1	package com.coding.assistant.ai;
2	
3	import com.coding.assistant.exception.BusinessException;
4	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
5	import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
6	import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
7	
8	import java.util.Map;
9	
10	@Slf4j
11	@Component
12	public class LlmProviderFactory {
13	
14	    @Value("${llm.provider}")
15	    private String providerName;
16	
17	    private final Map<String, LlmProvider> providers;
18	
19	    public LlmProviderFactory(Map<String, LlmProvider> providers) {
20	        this.providers = providers;
21	    }
22	
23	    public LlmProvider getProvider() {
24	        String beanName = providerName + "Provider";
25	        LlmProvider provider = providers.get(beanName);
26	        if (provider == null) {
27	            log.warn("LLM provider '{}' not found, available providers: {}", providerName, providers.keySet());
28	            throw new BusinessException(500, "LLM provider '" + providerName + "' is not configured or not available");
29	        }
30	        return provider;
31	    }
32	}

 `./\backend\src\main\java\com\coding\assistant\controller\ChatController.java`

1	package com.coding.assistant.controller;
2	
3	import com.coding.assistant.dto.*;
4	import com.coding.assistant.security.SecurityUtil;
5	import com.coding.assistant.service.ChatService;
6	import com.coding.assistant.service.FeedbackService;
7	import com.coding.assistant.service.ProgressService;
8	import jakarta.validation.Valid;
9	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
10	import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
11	import org.springframework.http.codec.ServerSentEvent;
12	import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;
13	import reactor.core.publisher.Flux;
14	
15	import java.util.List;
16	
17	@RestController
18	@RequestMapping("/api/chat")
19	@RequiredArgsConstructor
20	public class ChatController {
21	
22	    private final ChatService chatService;
23	    private final FeedbackService feedbackService;
24	    private final ProgressService progressService;
25	
26	    @PostMapping(value = "/send", produces = MediaType.TEXT_EVENT_STREAM_VALUE)
27	    public Flux<ServerSentEvent<String>> sendMessage(@Valid @RequestBody ChatSendRequest request) {
28	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
29	
30	        // Record chat action
31	        progressService.recordAction(userId, "chat", null);
32	
33	        return chatService.sendMessage(userId, request)
34	                .map(content -> ServerSentEvent.<String>builder()
35	                        .data(content)
36	                        .build())
37	                .concatWith(Flux.just(ServerSentEvent.<String>builder()
38	                        .event("done")
39	                        .data("[DONE]")
40	                        .build()));
41	    }
42	
43	    @GetMapping("/conversations")
44	    public ApiResponse<List<ConversationVO>> getConversations() {
45	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
46	        List<ConversationVO> conversations = chatService.getConversations(userId);
47	        return ApiResponse.success(conversations);
48	    }
49	
50	    @GetMapping("/conversations/{id}/messages")
51	    public ApiResponse<List<MessageVO>> getMessages(@PathVariable Long id) {
52	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
53	        List<MessageVO> messages = chatService.getMessages(userId, id);
54	        return ApiResponse.success(messages);
55	    }
56	
57	    @DeleteMapping("/conversations/{id}")
58	    public ApiResponse<Void> deleteConversation(@PathVariable Long id) {
59	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
60	        chatService.deleteConversation(userId, id);
61	        return ApiResponse.success();
62	    }
63	
64	    @PostMapping("/feedback")
65	    public ApiResponse<Void> submitFeedback(@Valid @RequestBody FeedbackRequest request) {
66	        Long userId = SecurityUtil.getCurrentUserId();
67	        feedbackService.submit(userId, request);
68	        progressService.recordAction(userId, "feedback", String.valueOf(request.getMessageId()));
69	        return ApiResponse.success();
70	    }
71	}
```

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-07 22:46:50Z)**_

现在我对这个项目有了足够的了解，可以给你一份详细的讲解提纲了。

---

## 中期检查讲解提纲：智能编程学习助手

---

### 一、一句话定位（30秒开场）

> 这是一个面向程序员学习者的 AI 驱动助手，核心亮点是：**大模型问答 + 知识图谱导航 + 个性化学习路径** 三位一体，帮助用户系统化地学习编程知识。

---

### 二、技术架构总览（2分钟）

用一张分层图来讲，从上到下：

```
前端 (Vue3 + Vite + ECharts)
        ↓  HTTP/SSE
后端 (Spring Boot)
   ├── 业务层：ChatService / PathService / ProgressService
   ├── AI层：LlmProviderFactory → ChatGLM / Qwen / OpenAI
   └── 数据层：MySQL (MyBatis-Plus) + Neo4j (图数据库)
```

**重点强调**：系统支持多 LLM 提供商切换——通过 [LlmProviderFactory.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/ai/LlmProviderFactory.java) 工厂模式，只需修改配置文件的 `llm.provider` 即可在 ChatGLM、Qwen、OpenAI 之间切换，体现了**开闭原则**。

---

### 三、三大技术核心逐一讲解

#### 核心1：流式问答（SSE）

- 用户发送问题后，后端不是等 AI 回答完再返回，而是用 **Server-Sent Events** 实时流式推送
- 代码位置：[ChatController.java:27](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/controller/ChatController.java#L27)，返回类型是 `Flux<ServerSentEvent<String>>`，这是 Spring WebFlux 的响应式编程
- 效果：用户看到 AI 像打字机一样逐字输出，首字响应 < 2秒

#### 核心2：知识图谱 + 拓扑排序生成学习路径（最有技术含量）

这是最值得重点讲的部分，位于 [PathService.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/PathService.java)。

**双重路径生成策略**（重点强调这个设计决策）：

```
用户请求学习目标（如"掌握Spring Cloud"）
       ↓
查询 Neo4j 图数据库
  ── 找到相关知识点及依赖关系
       ↓
拓扑排序（Kahn算法）
  ── 保证前置知识优先（如：Java基础→Spring→Spring Cloud）
  ── 排除用户已掌握的知识点
       ↓
若图中无数据 → 降级到 AI 生成
  ── 发送结构化 Prompt 给 LLM
  ── 解析返回的 JSON 数组
```

**可以说**：用 Neo4j 的 `DEPENDS_ON` 关系天然建模了知识依赖，然后用 Kahn 拓扑排序确保学习顺序合理，这是图数据库在教育场景的经典应用。

#### 核心3：知识图谱可视化

- 后端用 Cypher 查询 Neo4j，返回节点+边的结构化数据
- 前端用 ECharts 或 AntV G6 渲染力导向图
- 节点按类别着色（语言/框架/数据库/工具），支持点击展开、懒加载、搜索定位

---

### 四、数据模型设计亮点（1分钟）

**两库协同**：
- **MySQL**：存用户、会话、消息、代码片段（结构化、适合关系查询）
- **Neo4j**：存知识点节点和依赖关系（图结构、适合路径遍历）

```
Knowledge节点 --[DEPENDS_ON]--> Knowledge节点
Knowledge节点 --[HAS_RESOURCE]--> Resource节点
```

---

### 五、安全与工程规范（30秒加分项）

- **JWT + Spring Security** 做无状态认证
- **XSS 过滤器**：[XssFilter.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/config/XssFilter.java) 防注入攻击
- **Docker Compose** 一键部署（MySQL + Neo4j + 后端 + 前端 Nginx）

---

### 六、如果老师追问

| 问题 | 你的回答方向 |
|------|------|
| "为什么用 Neo4j 不用 MySQL 存知识图谱？" | 知识点有多层依赖关系，用图遍历（Cypher的 `*0..5`）比 SQL 多表 JOIN 性能好很多 |
| "AI 生成路径和图谱路径有什么区别？" | 图谱路径更准确（基于真实依赖关系），AI路径是兜底方案（适用于图谱还没有录入的新领域） |
| "SSE 和 WebSocket 有什么区别？" | SSE 是单向推送、基于 HTTP，更简单；WebSocket 是双向通信，本项目只需服务端推送所以用 SSE |
| "后续怎么扩展？" | SPEC 中预留了 RAG（向量检索）扩展点，可以接入 Milvus/Elasticsearch 做语义搜索 |

---

**建议的讲解顺序**：架构图 → 演示流式问答 → 演示知识图谱 → 演示学习路径生成 → 讲 PathService 的核心代码 → 回答追问。把 PathService 的拓扑排序那段代码打开给老师看，那是整个项目技术含量最高的地方。

---

```text
1	package com.coding.assistant.service;
2	
3	import com.coding.assistant.ai.ChatMessage;
4	import com.coding.assistant.ai.LlmProviderFactory;
5	import com.coding.assistant.dto.*;
6	import com.coding.assistant.entity.Conversation;
7	import com.coding.assistant.entity.Message;
8	import com.coding.assistant.exception.BusinessException;
9	import com.coding.assistant.mapper.ConversationMapper;
10	import com.coding.assistant.mapper.MessageMapper;
11	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
12	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
13	import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
14	import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
15	import reactor.core.publisher.Flux;
16	
17	import java.time.LocalDateTime;
18	import java.util.ArrayList;
19	import java.util.List;
20	import java.util.stream.Collectors;
21	
22	@Slf4j
23	@Service
24	@RequiredArgsConstructor
25	public class ChatService {
26	
27	    private final ConversationMapper conversationMapper;
28	    private final MessageMapper messageMapper;
29	    private final LlmProviderFactory llmProviderFactory;
30	    private final KnowledgeRetrievalService knowledgeRetrievalService;
31	
32	    private static final String SYSTEM_PROMPT = """
33	            You are an intelligent coding assistant. You help developers with programming questions, \
34	            code reviews, debugging, and learning new technologies. \
35	            When answering questions, use the provided knowledge context if available. \
36	            Be concise, accurate, and provide code examples when appropriate. \
37	            If you're unsure about something, say so rather than guessing.""";
38	
39	    @Transactional
40	    public Flux<String> sendMessage(Long userId, ChatSendRequest request) {
41	        // Create or get conversation
42	        Conversation conversation;
43	        if (request.getConversationId() == null) {
44	            conversation = Conversation.builder()
45	                    .userId(userId)
46	                    .title(generateTitle(request.getContent()))
47	                    .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
48	                    .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())
49	                    .build();
50	            conversationMapper.insert(conversation);
51	        } else {
52	            conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(request.getConversationId());
53	            if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
54	                throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
55	            }
56	            conversation.setUpdatedAt(LocalDateTime.now());
57	            conversationMapper.updateById(conversation);
58	        }
59	
60	        // Save user message
61	        Message userMessage = Message.builder()
62	                .conversationId(conversation.getId())
63	                .role("user")
64	                .content(request.getContent())
65	                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
66	                .build();
67	        messageMapper.insert(userMessage);
68	
69	        // Retrieve knowledge context
70	        List<KnowledgeNodeVO> knowledgeNodes = knowledgeRetrievalService.retrieve(request.getContent());
71	        String knowledgeContext = knowledgeRetrievalService.buildContext(knowledgeNodes);
72	
73	        // Build conversation history
74	        List<Message> history = messageMapper.selectByConversationIdOrderByCreatedAt(conversation.getId());
75	        List<ChatMessage> chatMessages = history.stream()
76	                .map(m -> new ChatMessage(m.getRole(), m.getContent()))
77	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
78	
79	        // Build system prompt with knowledge context
80	        String systemPrompt = SYSTEM_PROMPT;
81	        if (!knowledgeContext.isEmpty()) {
82	            systemPrompt = systemPrompt + "\n\n" + knowledgeContext;
83	        }
84	
85	        // Stream LLM response
86	        StringBuilder responseBuilder = new StringBuilder();
87	        Long conversationId = conversation.getId();
88	
89	        return llmProviderFactory.getProvider()
90	                .chatStream(chatMessages, systemPrompt)
91	                .doOnNext(responseBuilder::append)
92	                .doOnComplete(() -> {
93	                    // Save assistant message on completion
94	                    String sourcesJson = knowledgeNodes.isEmpty() ? null :
95	                            knowledgeNodes.stream()
96	                                    .map(n -> "\"" + n.getId() + "\"")
97	                                    .collect(Collectors.joining(",", "[", "]"));
98	
99	                    Message assistantMessage = Message.builder()
100	                            .conversationId(conversationId)
101	                            .role("assistant")
102	                            .content(responseBuilder.toString())
103	                            .sources(sourcesJson)
104	                            .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
105	                            .build();
106	                    messageMapper.insert(assistantMessage);
107	                    log.debug("Assistant message saved for conversation {}", conversationId);
108	                })
109	                .doOnError(e -> log.error("Error during chat stream: {}", e.getMessage()));
110	    }
111	
112	    public List<ConversationVO> getConversations(Long userId) {
113	        List<Conversation> conversations = conversationMapper.selectByUserIdOrderByUpdatedAtDesc(userId);
114	        return conversations.stream()
115	                .map(this::toConversationVO)
116	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
117	    }
118	
119	    public List<MessageVO> getMessages(Long userId, Long conversationId) {
120	        Conversation conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(conversationId);
121	        if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
122	            throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
123	        }
124	
125	        List<Message> messages = messageMapper.selectByConversationIdOrderByCreatedAt(conversationId);
126	        return messages.stream()
127	                .map(this::toMessageVO)
128	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
129	    }
130	
131	    @Transactional
132	    public void deleteConversation(Long userId, Long conversationId) {
133	        Conversation conversation = conversationMapper.selectById(conversationId);
134	        if (conversation == null || !conversation.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
135	            throw new BusinessException(404, "Conversation not found");
136	        }
137	
138	        messageMapper.deleteByConversationId(conversationId);
139	        conversationMapper.deleteById(conversationId);
140	        log.info("Conversation {} deleted by user {}", conversationId, userId);
141	    }
142	
143	    /**
144	     * 生成学习路径（非流式调用）
145	     */
146	    public String generateLearningPath(String prompt) {
147	        try {
148	            log.info("Calling AI to generate learning path with prompt: {}", prompt);
149	
150	            // 构建消息列表
151	            List<ChatMessage> messages = new ArrayList<>();
152	            messages.add(new ChatMessage("user", prompt));
153	
154	            // 调用 LLM 提供者（非流式）
155	            // 注意：这里假设 getProvider() 有 chat 方法，如果没有请告知
156	            String response = llmProviderFactory.getProvider().chat(messages, SYSTEM_PROMPT);
157	
158	            log.info("AI response for learning path received, length: {}", response != null ? response.length() : 0);
159	            return response;
160	
161	        } catch (Exception e) {
162	            log.error("Failed to generate learning path: {}", e.getMessage(), e);
163	            return null;
164	        }
165	    }
166	
167	    private String generateTitle(String content) {
168	        if (content.length() <= 50) {
169	            return content;
170	        }
171	        return content.substring(0, 47) + "...";
172	    }
173	
174	    private ConversationVO toConversationVO(Conversation conversation) {
175	        return ConversationVO.builder()
176	                .id(conversation.getId())
177	                .title(conversation.getTitle())
178	                .createdAt(conversation.getCreatedAt())
179	                .updatedAt(conversation.getUpdatedAt())
180	                .build();
181	    }
182	
183	    private MessageVO toMessageVO(Message message) {
184	        return MessageVO.builder()
185	                .id(message.getId())
186	                .conversationId(message.getConversationId())
187	                .role(message.getRole())
188	                .content(message.getContent())
189	                .sources(message.getSources())
190	                .createdAt(message.getCreatedAt())
191	                .build();
192	    }
193	}

 `./\backend\src\main\java\com\coding\assistant\service\KnowledgeRetrievalService.java`

1	package com.coding.assistant.service;
2	
3	import com.coding.assistant.dto.KnowledgeNodeVO;
4	import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
5	import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
6	import org.neo4j.driver.Driver;
7	import org.neo4j.driver.Record;
8	import org.neo4j.driver.Result;
9	import org.neo4j.driver.Session;
10	import org.neo4j.driver.Values;
11	import org.neo4j.driver.types.Node;
12	import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
13	
14	import java.util.ArrayList;
15	import java.util.Arrays;
16	import java.util.List;
17	import java.util.stream.Collectors;
18	
19	@Slf4j
20	@Service
21	@RequiredArgsConstructor
22	public class KnowledgeRetrievalService {
23	
24	    private final Driver neo4jDriver;
25	
26	    /**
27	     * Retrieve knowledge nodes relevant to the given question
28	     */
29	    public List<KnowledgeNodeVO> retrieve(String question) {
30	        List<String> keywords = extractKeywords(question);
31	        if (keywords.isEmpty()) {
32	            return List.of();
33	        }
34	
35	        List<KnowledgeNodeVO> nodes = new ArrayList<>();
36	
37	        try (Session session = neo4jDriver.session()) {
38	            String cypher = "MATCH (n:Knowledge) " +
39	                    "WHERE ANY(k IN $keywords WHERE toLower(n.name) CONTAINS toLower(k) " +
40	                    "OR ANY(kw IN n.keywords WHERE toLower(kw) CONTAINS toLower(k))) " +
41	                    "RETURN n LIMIT 10";
42	
43	            Result result = session.run(cypher, Values.parameters("keywords", keywords));
44	
45	            while (result.hasNext()) {
46	                Record record = result.next();
47	                Node node = record.get("n").asNode();
48	                nodes.add(mapToKnowledgeNodeVO(node));
49	            }
50	        } catch (Exception e) {
51	            log.error("Error retrieving knowledge from Neo4j: {}", e.getMessage());
52	        }
53	
54	        return nodes;
55	    }
56	
57	    /**
58	     * Build context string from knowledge nodes for LLM prompt
59	     */
60	    public String buildContext(List<KnowledgeNodeVO> nodes) {
61	        if (nodes == null || nodes.isEmpty()) {
62	            return "";
63	        }
64	
65	        StringBuilder context = new StringBuilder();
66	        context.append("Relevant knowledge context:\n\n");
67	
68	        for (int i = 0; i < nodes.size(); i++) {
69	            KnowledgeNodeVO node = nodes.get(i);
70	            context.append(String.format("%d. **%s** [%s] (Difficulty: %s)\n",
71	                    i + 1, node.getName(), node.getCategory(), node.getDifficulty()));
72	            if (node.getDescription() != null && !node.getDescription().isEmpty()) {
73	                context.append("   ").append(node.getDescription()).append("\n");
74	            }
75	            if (node.getKeywords() != null && !node.getKeywords().isEmpty()) {
76	                context.append("   Keywords: ").append(String.join(", ", node.getKeywords())).append("\n");
77	            }
78	            context.append("\n");
79	        }
80	
81	        return context.toString();
82	    }
83	
84	    private List<String> extractKeywords(String question) {
85	        // Simple keyword extraction: split by common delimiters and filter short words
86	        String cleaned = question.replaceAll("[^a-zA-Z0-9\\u4e00-\\u9fff\\s]", " ");
87	        return Arrays.stream(cleaned.split("\\s+"))
88	                .filter(word -> word.length() >= 2)
89	                .map(String::toLowerCase)
90	                .distinct()
91	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
92	    }
93	
94	    private KnowledgeNodeVO mapToKnowledgeNodeVO(Node node) {
95	        List<String> keywords = new ArrayList<>();
96	        if (node.containsKey("keywords")) {
97	            node.get("keywords").asList(v -> v.asString()).forEach(keywords::add);
98	        }
99	
100	        return KnowledgeNodeVO.builder()
101	                .id(node.containsKey("id") ? node.get("id").asString() : String.valueOf(node.id()))
102	                .name(node.containsKey("name") ? node.get("name").asString() : "")
103	                .category(node.containsKey("category") ? node.get("category").asString() : "")
104	                .description(node.containsKey("description") ? node.get("description").asString() : "")
105	                .difficulty(node.containsKey("difficulty") ? node.get("difficulty").asString() : "")
106	                .keywords(keywords)
107	                .build();
108	    }
109	}
```

40	    public void recordAction(Long userId, String actionType, String targetId) {
41	        LearningRecord record = LearningRecord.builder()

51	    public DashboardVO getDashboard(Long userId) {
52	        // Total learning days
53	        int totalDays = learningRecordMapper.countDistinctDaysByUserId(userId);
54	
55	        // Total chats
56	        Long totalChats = conversationMapper.selectCount(
57	                new LambdaQueryWrapper<com.coding.assistant.entity.Conversation>()
58	                        .eq(com.coding.assistant.entity.Conversation::getUserId, userId)
59	        );
60	
61	        // Total snippets
62	        Long totalSnippets = codeSnippetMapper.selectCount(
63	                new LambdaQueryWrapper<CodeSnippet>()

65	        );
66	
67	        // Knowledge coverage (based on distinct action types: chat, code_save, path_learn, graph_explore, feedback)
68	        List<Map<String, Object>> actionCounts = learningRecordMapper.countByUserIdGroupByActionType(userId);
69	        double knowledgeCoverage = Math.min(actionCounts.size() * 20.0, 100.0);
70	
71	        // Recent activity (last 30 days)
72	        LocalDateTime thirtyDaysAgo = LocalDateTime.now().minusDays(30);
73	        List<Map<String, Object>> dailyCounts = learningRecordMapper.countByUserIdGroupByDate(
74	                userId, thirtyDaysAgo, LocalDateTime.now()
75	        );
76	
77	        List<ActivityVO> recentActivity = dailyCounts.stream()
78	                .map(m -> ActivityVO.builder()
79	                        .date(String.valueOf(m.get("date")))
80	                        .count(((Number) m.get("count")).intValue())
81	                        .build())
82	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
83	
84	        return DashboardVO.builder()
85	                .totalDays(totalDays)
86	                .totalChats(totalChats.intValue())
87	                .totalSnippets(totalSnippets.intValue())
88	                .knowledgeCoverage(knowledgeCoverage)
89	                .recentActivity(recentActivity)
90	                .build();
91	    }

95	        LocalDateTime startOfNextYear = LocalDateTime.of(year + 1, 1, 1, 0, 0);
96	
97	        List<Map<String, Object>> dailyCounts = learningRecordMapper.countByUserIdGroupByDate(
98	                userId, startOfYear, startOfNextYear
99	        );
100	
101	        List<HeatmapDataVO> data = dailyCounts.stream()
102	                .map(m -> HeatmapDataVO.builder()

104	                        .count(((Number) m.get("count")).intValue())
105	                        .build())
106	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
107	
108	        return HeatmapVO.builder()

114	    public RadarVO getRadar(Long userId) {
115	        List<Map<String, Object>> actionCounts = learningRecordMapper.countByUserIdGroupByActionType(userId);
116	
117	        List<String> categories = new ArrayList<>();
118	        List<Double> values = new ArrayList<>();
119	
120	        // Define standard categories
121	        String[] standardCategories = {"chat", "code_save", "path_learn", "graph_explore", "feedback"};
122	        String[] displayNames = {"Chat", "Code Snippets", "Learning Paths", "Graph Exploration", "Feedback"};
123	
124	        Map<String, Long> countMap = actionCounts.stream()
125	                .collect(Collectors.toMap(
126	                        m -> String.valueOf(m.get("action_type")),
127	                        m -> ((Number) m.get("count")).longValue(),
128	                        (a, b) -> a
129	                ));
130	
131	        double maxCount = countMap.values().stream().mapToLong(Long::longValue).max().orElse(1);
132	
133	        for (int i = 0; i < standardCategories.length; i++) {
134	            categories.add(displayNames[i]);
135	            long count = countMap.getOrDefault(standardCategories[i], 0L);
136	            values.add(maxCount > 0 ? Math.round(count * 100.0 / maxCount) / 1.0 : 0.0);
137	        }
138	
139	        return RadarVO.builder()
140	                .categories(categories)
141	                .values(values)
142	                .build();
143	    }

145	    public byte[] generateReport(Long userId) {
146	        try {
147	            DashboardVO dashboard = getDashboard(userId);
148	            HeatmapVO heatmap = getHeatmap(userId, LocalDate.now().getYear());

154	            document.open();
155	
156	            // Title
157	            Font titleFont = new Font(Font.FontFamily.HELVETICA, 24, Font.BOLD, BaseColor.DARK_GRAY);
158	            Paragraph title = new Paragraph("Learning Progress Report", titleFont);
159	            title.setAlignment(Element.ALIGN_CENTER);
160	            title.setSpacingAfter(20);
161	            document.add(title);
162	
163	            // Date
164	            Font dateFont = new Font(Font.FontFamily.HELVETICA, 12, Font.NORMAL, BaseColor.GRAY);
165	            Paragraph date = new Paragraph("Generated: " + LocalDate.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE), dateFont);
166	            date.setAlignment(Element.ALIGN_CENTER);
167	            date.setSpacingAfter(30);
168	            document.add(date);
169	
170	            // Overview Section
171	            Font sectionFont = new Font(Font.FontFamily.HELVETICA, 16, Font.BOLD, BaseColor.DARK_GRAY);
172	            Paragraph overviewTitle = new Paragraph("Overview", sectionFont);
173	            overviewTitle.setSpacingAfter(10);
174	            document.add(overviewTitle);
175	
176	            // Stats table
177	            PdfPTable statsTable = new PdfPTable(2);
178	            statsTable.setWidthPercentage(80);
179	            statsTable.setSpacingAfter(20);
180	
181	            Font cellFont = new Font(Font.FontFamily.HELVETICA, 12, Font.NORMAL);
182	            Font valuFont = new Font(Font.FontFamily.HELVETICA, 12, Font.BOLD);
183	
184	            addTableRow(statsTable, "Total Learning Days", String.valueOf(dashboard.getTotalDays()), cellFont, valuFont);
185	            addTableRow(statsTable, "Total Conversations", String.valueOf(dashboard.getTotalChats()), cellFont, valuFont);
186	            addTableRow(statsTable, "Total Code Snippets", String.valueOf(dashboard.getTotalSnippets()), cellFont, valuFont);
187	            addTableRow(statsTable, "Knowledge Coverage", String.format("%.1f%%", dashboard.getKnowledgeCoverage()), cellFont, valuFont);
188	
189	            document.add(statsTable);
190	
191	            // Activity Distribution
192	            Paragraph radarTitle = new Paragraph("Activity Distribution", sectionFont);
193	            radarTitle.setSpacingAfter(10);
194	            document.add(radarTitle);
195	
196	            PdfPTable radarTable = new PdfPTable(2);
197	            radarTable.setWidthPercentage(80);
198	            radarTable.setSpacingAfter(20);
199	
200	            for (int i = 0; i < radar.getCategories().size(); i++) {
201	                addTableRow(radarTable, radar.getCategories().get(i),
202	                        String.format("%.0f%%", radar.getValues().get(i)), cellFont, valuFont);
203	            }
204	            document.add(radarTable);
205	
206	            // Recent Activity
207	            if (!dashboard.getRecentActivity().isEmpty()) {
208	                Paragraph activityTitle = new Paragraph("Recent Activity (Last 30 Days)", sectionFont);
209	                activityTitle.setSpacingAfter(10);

214	                activityTable.setSpacingAfter(20);
215	
216	                for (ActivityVO activity : dashboard.getRecentActivity()) {
217	                    addTableRow(activityTable, activity.getDate(),
218	                            activity.getCount() + " activities", cellFont, valuFont);
219	                }
220	                document.add(activityTable);
221	            }
222	
223	            document.close();
224	            return baos.toByteArray();
225	        } catch (DocumentException e) {
226	            log.error("Error generating PDF report: {}", e.getMessage());
227	            throw new BusinessException(500, "Failed to generate report");
228	        }
229	    }
230	
231	    private void addTableRow(PdfPTable table, String label, String value, Font labelFont, Font valueFont) {
232	        PdfPCell labelCell = new PdfPCell(new Phrase(label, labelFont));
233	        labelCell.setBorderColor(BaseColor.LIGHT_GRAY);
234	        labelCell.setPadding(8);
235	        table.addCell(labelCell);
236	
237	        PdfPCell valueCell = new PdfPCell(new Phrase(value, valueFont));
238	        valueCell.setBorderColor(BaseColor.LIGHT_GRAY);
239	        valueCell.setPadding(8);
240	        valueCell.setHorizontalAlignment(Element.ALIGN_RIGHT);
241	        table.addCell(valueCell);
242	    }
243	}

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-07 22:49:01Z)**_

现在我对整个项目的实现细节有了清晰的了解，可以给出有针对性的改进建议了。

---

## 项目改进思路

我把建议按**优先级**分为三类：容易落地的提升、中等难度的功能升级、以及较大的技术演进方向。

---

### 一、容易落地（短期内可完成）

**1. KnowledgeRetrievalService 关键词检索太粗糙**

当前 [KnowledgeRetrievalService.java:84](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/KnowledgeRetrievalService.java#L84) 的关键词提取就是简单按空格分词，对中文问题几乎无效（比如"如何整合Spring和Redis"拆出来都是单字）。

改进方向：
- 接入 HanLP 或 jieba-analysis 做中文分词，提取真正有意义的技术关键词
- 或者在调用 LLM 前先用一次轻量 prompt 让 AI 提取关键词（"从以下问题中提取3-5个技术关键词，只返回关键词列表"）

**2. 知识覆盖率计算逻辑有问题**

[ProgressService.java:69](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/ProgressService.java#L69) 当前用"行为类型数量 × 20"计算知识覆盖率，最多5类行为就是100%，对新用户第一天就可能显示80%，完全失真。

改进：改为用用户已完成的学习路径节点数 / Neo4j 图谱总节点数来计算，真实反映覆盖程度。

**3. 对话历史没有截断，会超 token 限制**

[ChatService.java:74](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/ChatService.java#L74) 每次把整个会话历史全部传给 LLM，一个长对话会话超出 token 上限后直接报错。

改进：保留最近 N 条消息（比如最近10条）+ 第一条用户消息作为上下文窗口，超出的直接截断。

**4. PDF 报告不支持中文**

[ProgressService.java:157](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/ProgressService.java#L157) 用的是 `Font.FontFamily.HELVETICA`，这个字体不包含中文字符，如果有中文数据会显示乱码。

改进：在 resources 里嵌入一个中文字体（如思源黑体），用 `BaseFont.createFont` 加载。

---

### 二、中等难度（值得在项目后期实现）

**5. 学习路径的 AI 降级策略可以更聪明**

当前 [PathService.java:83](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/PathService.java#L83) 的降级逻辑是图谱里没找到就直接交给 AI，但 AI 生成的节点用 `ai_xxxxxxxx` 作为 ID，与图谱完全脱节——学习路径走完了，知识图谱里的节点状态不会更新。

改进思路：AI 生成路径后，自动尝试将每个节点名称与图谱中的节点做模糊匹配（Cypher `CONTAINS` 查询），如果能对应上就建立关联，实现"AI路径反哺图谱"。

**6. 代码片段智能推荐目前是空实现**

[SnippetController.java](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/controller/SnippetController.java) 里 `/snippets/recommend` 接口存在，但检索逻辑可能只是简单标签匹配。

改进：在对话的 `doOnComplete` 回调里（[ChatService.java:90](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/ChatService.java#L90)），分析对话内容提取编程语言/技术标签，主动推送匹配的代码片段作为侧边栏建议。

**7. 雷达图维度太固定**

[ProgressService.java:121](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/ProgressService.java#L121) 的雷达图维度是硬编码的5个行为类型。

改进：改为按 Neo4j 里的知识点 category（Java/Spring/数据库/工具/算法等）来划分，统计用户在每个知识领域提问的次数，雷达图才能真正反映"哪个技术领域掌握了多少"。

---

### 三、技术演进方向（较大投入，但亮点突出）

**8. RAG 向量检索（SPEC 里预留的方向）**

当前检索是图谱关键词匹配，语义相似度为零（问"怎么做缓存"匹配不到"Redis"相关节点）。

升级路径：
```
当前：问题关键词 → Neo4j CONTAINS 匹配
升级后：问题 → Embedding 向量 → Milvus/PgVector 近似向量搜索 → 召回相关文档
```
可以先用轻量方案：把所有 Neo4j 知识节点的 description 向量化后存到 MySQL 的 JSON 字段里，用余弦相似度做简单检索，不引入新中间件。

**9. 会话标题自动生成现在太简单**

[ChatService.java:167](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/ChatService.java#L167) 直接截取前50个字符作为标题，一个技术问题的前50字通常是废话。

升级：在第一次回答完成的 `doOnComplete` 里，异步调用一次 LLM："用5个字概括这个对话的主题"，把结果更新到 conversation.title，前端会话列表显示效果提升明显。

**10. 学习路径缺少"当前节点关联问答"**

用户点开学习路径里的某个节点（比如"Spring事务管理"），应该能看到"针对这个知识点，你之前问过什么问题"以及"推荐你去问什么问题"。

实现思路：在节点详情接口里，查询 `message` 表中 `sources` 字段包含该节点 ID 的历史消息，直接呈现相关问答上下文。

---

### 优先级建议

| 优先级 | 改进点 | 原因 |
|--------|--------|------|
| 高 | 对话历史截断 | 影响系统稳定性，真实使用会报错 |
| 高 | 知识覆盖率计算 | 演示时数据失真会被老师发现 |
| 中 | 中文分词改进 | 直接影响检索质量，核心功能 |
| 中 | 雷达图维度改造 | 演示效果好，逻辑也更合理 |
| 低 | AI路径反哺图谱 | 工程量稍大，但是差异化亮点 |

---

23	    private final SnippetService snippetService;
24	    private final ProgressService progressService;

26	    @PostMapping

38	        return ApiResponse.success(result);
39	    }
40	
41	    @GetMapping("/recommend")

45	        return ApiResponse.success(snippets);

49	    public ApiResponse<SnippetVO> update(@PathVariable Long id,
50	                                          @Valid @RequestBody SnippetRequest request) {

73	    @PostMapping("/import")

1	package com.coding.assistant.service;

18	
19	import java.time.LocalDateTime;

22	import java.util.List;
23	import java.util.stream.Collectors;
24	
25	@Slf4j
26	@Service
27	@RequiredArgsConstructor
28	public class SnippetService {
29	
30	    private final CodeSnippetMapper codeSnippetMapper;
31	    private final MessageMapper messageMapper;
32	    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;
33	
34	    @Transactional
35	    public SnippetVO create(Long userId, SnippetRequest request) {
36	        String tagsJson = null;
37	        if (request.getTags() != null && !request.getTags().isEmpty()) {
38	            try {
39	                tagsJson = objectMapper.writeValueAsString(request.getTags());
40	            } catch (JsonProcessingException e) {
41	                log.error("Error serializing tags: {}", e.getMessage());
42	            }
43	        }
44	
45	        CodeSnippet snippet = CodeSnippet.builder()
46	                .userId(userId)
47	                .title(request.getTitle())
48	                .code(request.getCode())
49	                .language(request.getLanguage())
50	                .description(request.getDescription())
51	                .tags(tagsJson)
52	                .useCount(0)
53	                .createdAt(LocalDateTime.now())
54	                .updatedAt(LocalDateTime.now())
55	                .build();
56	        codeSnippetMapper.insert(snippet);
57	
58	        log.info("Code snippet created: id={}, userId={}", snippet.getId(), userId);
59	        return toSnippetVO(snippet);
60	    }
61	
62	    public PageResult<SnippetVO> list(Long userId, SnippetQueryRequest request) {
63	        Page<CodeSnippet> page = new Page<>(request.getPage(), request.getSize());
64	        Page<CodeSnippet> result = (Page<CodeSnippet>) codeSnippetMapper.selectByUserIdWithFilter(
65	                page, userId, request.getKeyword(), request.getTag());
66	
67	        List<SnippetVO> records = result.getRecords().stream()
68	                .map(this::toSnippetVO)
69	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
70	
71	        return PageResult.<SnippetVO>builder()
72	                .records(records)
73	                .total(result.getTotal())
74	                .page(request.getPage())
75	                .size(request.getSize())
76	                .build();
77	    }
78	
79	    public List<SnippetVO> recommend(Long userId, Long conversationId) {
80	        // Get conversation keywords from messages
81	        List<Message> messages = messageMapper.selectByConversationIdOrderByCreatedAt(conversationId);
82	        if (messages.isEmpty()) {
83	            return List.of();
84	        }
85	
86	        // Extract keywords from user messages
87	        String combinedContent = messages.stream()
88	                .filter(m -> "user".equals(m.getRole()))
89	                .map(Message::getContent)
90	                .collect(Collectors.joining(" "));
91	
92	        List<String> keywords = extractKeywords(combinedContent);
93	
94	        // Get user's snippets
95	        List<CodeSnippet> allSnippets = codeSnippetMapper.selectList(
96	                new LambdaQueryWrapper<CodeSnippet>()
97	                        .eq(CodeSnippet::getUserId, userId)
98	        );
99	
100	        // Score and sort snippets by relevance
101	        return allSnippets.stream()
102	                .map(snippet -> {
103	                    int score = calculateRelevanceScore(snippet, keywords);
104	                    return new Object[]{snippet, score};
105	                })
106	                .filter(pair -> (int) pair[1] > 0)
107	                .sorted((a, b) -> {
108	                    int scoreCompare = Integer.compare((int) b[1], (int) a[1]);
109	                    if (scoreCompare != 0) return scoreCompare;
110	                    return Integer.compare(
111	                            ((CodeSnippet) b[0]).getUseCount(),
112	                            ((CodeSnippet) a[0]).getUseCount()
113	                    );
114	                })
115	                .limit(10)
116	                .map(pair -> toSnippetVO((CodeSnippet) pair[0]))
117	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
118	    }
119	
120	    @Transactional
121	    public SnippetVO update(Long userId, Long id, SnippetRequest request) {
122	        CodeSnippet snippet = codeSnippetMapper.selectById(id);
123	        if (snippet == null || !snippet.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
124	            throw new BusinessException(404, "Snippet not found");
125	        }
126	
127	        snippet.setTitle(request.getTitle());
128	        snippet.setCode(request.getCode());
129	        snippet.setLanguage(request.getLanguage());
130	        snippet.setDescription(request.getDescription());
131	        snippet.setUpdatedAt(LocalDateTime.now());
132	
133	        if (request.getTags() != null) {
134	            try {
135	                snippet.setTags(objectMapper.writeValueAsString(request.getTags()));
136	            } catch (JsonProcessingException e) {
137	                log.error("Error serializing tags: {}", e.getMessage());
138	            }
139	        }
140	
141	        codeSnippetMapper.updateById(snippet);
142	        log.info("Code snippet updated: id={}", id);
143	        return toSnippetVO(snippet);
144	    }
145	
146	    @Transactional
147	    public void delete(Long userId, Long id) {
148	        CodeSnippet snippet = codeSnippetMapper.selectById(id);
149	        if (snippet == null || !snippet.getUserId().equals(userId)) {
150	            throw new BusinessException(404, "Snippet not found");
151	        }
152	
153	        codeSnippetMapper.deleteById(id);
154	        log.info("Code snippet deleted: id={}, userId={}", id, userId);
155	    }
156	
157	    public String exportAll(Long userId) {
158	        List<CodeSnippet> snippets = codeSnippetMapper.selectList(
159	                new LambdaQueryWrapper<CodeSnippet>()
160	                        .eq(CodeSnippet::getUserId, userId)
161	                        .orderByDesc(CodeSnippet::getCreatedAt)
162	        );
163	
164	        List<SnippetVO> vos = snippets.stream()
165	                .map(this::toSnippetVO)
166	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
167	
168	        try {
169	            return objectMapper.writeValueAsString(vos);
170	        } catch (JsonProcessingException e) {
171	            log.error("Error exporting snippets: {}", e.getMessage());
172	            throw new BusinessException(500, "Failed to export snippets");
173	        }
174	    }
175	
176	    @Transactional
177	    public ImportResultVO importFromJson(Long userId, String json) {
178	        int successCount = 0;
179	        int failCount = 0;
180	        List<String> errors = new ArrayList<>();
181	
182	        try {
183	            List<SnippetRequest> requests = objectMapper.readValue(json,
184	                    new TypeReference<List<SnippetRequest>>() {});
185	
186	            for (int i = 0; i < requests.size(); i++) {
187	                SnippetRequest request = requests.get(i);
188	                try {
189	                    if (request.getTitle() == null || request.getTitle().isBlank()) {
190	                        throw new IllegalArgumentException("Title is required");
191	                    }
192	                    if (request.getCode() == null || request.getCode().isBlank()) {
193	                        throw new IllegalArgumentException("Code is required");
194	                    }
195	                    if (request.getLanguage() == null || request.getLanguage().isBlank()) {
196	                        throw new IllegalArgumentException("Language is required");
197	                    }
198	
199	                    create(userId, request);
200	                    successCount++;
201	                } catch (Exception e) {
202	                    failCount++;
203	                    errors.add("Item " + (i + 1) + ": " + e.getMessage());
204	                }
205	            }
206	        } catch (JsonProcessingException e) {
207	            throw new BusinessException(400, "Invalid JSON format: " + e.getMessage());
208	        }
209	
210	        log.info("Snippet import completed for user {}: success={}, fail={}", userId, successCount, failCount);
211	
212	        return ImportResultVO.builder()
213	                .successCount(successCount)
214	                .failCount(failCount)
215	                .errors(errors)
216	                .build();
217	    }
218	
219	    private SnippetVO toSnippetVO(CodeSnippet snippet) {
220	        List<String> tags = new ArrayList<>();
221	        if (snippet.getTags() != null && !snippet.getTags().isEmpty()) {
222	            try {
223	                tags = objectMapper.readValue(snippet.getTags(),
224	                        new TypeReference<List<String>>() {});
225	            } catch (JsonProcessingException e) {
226	                log.warn("Failed to parse tags for snippet {}: {}", snippet.getId(), e.getMessage());
227	            }
228	        }
229	
230	        return SnippetVO.builder()
231	                .id(snippet.getId())
232	                .title(snippet.getTitle())
233	                .code(snippet.getCode())
234	                .language(snippet.getLanguage())
235	                .description(snippet.getDescription())
236	                .tags(tags)
237	                .useCount(snippet.getUseCount())
238	                .createdAt(snippet.getCreatedAt())
239	                .updatedAt(snippet.getUpdatedAt())
240	                .build();
241	    }
242	
243	    private List<String> extractKeywords(String content) {
244	        String cleaned = content.replaceAll("[^a-zA-Z0-9\\u4e00-\\u9fff\\s]", " ");
245	        return Arrays.stream(cleaned.split("\\s+"))
246	                .filter(word -> word.length() >= 2)
247	                .map(String::toLowerCase)
248	                .distinct()
249	                .collect(Collectors.toList());
250	    }
251	
252	    private int calculateRelevanceScore(CodeSnippet snippet, List<String> keywords) {
253	        int score = 0;
254	        String title = snippet.getTitle() != null ? snippet.getTitle().toLowerCase() : "";
255	        String description = snippet.getDescription() != null ? snippet.getDescription().toLowerCase() : "";
256	        String tags = snippet.getTags() != null ? snippet.getTags().toLowerCase() : "";
257	
258	        for (String keyword : keywords) {
259	            if (title.contains(keyword)) score += 3;
260	            if (tags.contains(keyword)) score += 2;
261	            if (description.contains(keyword)) score += 1;
262	        }
263	        return score;
264	    }
265	}

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I can see the full picture of the "智能推荐" (smart recommendation) feature. Let me explain it clearly.

The `recommend` method in `SnippetService.java` (line 79) works as follows:
1. Takes a `conversationId` as input
2. Gets all messages from that conversation
3. Extracts keywords from the user's messages in that conversation
4. Gets all of the user's code snippets
5. Scores each snippet based on keyword matches (title: +3, tags: +2, description: +1)
6. Returns top 10 snippets sorted by score (then by useCount as tiebreaker)


7. The feature is exposed through the `GET /api/snippets/recommend?conversationId=xxx` endpoint, which recommends relevant code snippets from the user's collection based on keywords extracted from the current conversation.

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-04-07 22:51:23Z)**_

就是代码片段模块里的这个接口：`GET /api/snippets/recommend?conversationId=xxx`

**它做的事情**（[SnippetService.java:79](backend/src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/SnippetService.java#L79)）：

1. 传入一个会话 ID
2. 读取该会话里所有用户消息，拼接成一段文本
3. 对这段文本做关键词提取（按空格分词）
4. 拿这些关键词去匹配用户自己保存的所有代码片段，按相关度打分：
   - 标题命中：+3分
   - 标签命中：+2分
   - 描述命中：+1分
5. 返回得分 > 0 的前10个片段，分数相同时按使用次数排序

**举个例子**：你在对话里问了"Spring Boot 整合 Redis 怎么做"，系统就会从你保存的代码片段里找标题/标签/描述含有 `spring`、`redis`、`boot` 的片段推荐给你。

**实际效果的局限性**：这个推荐是纯关键词匹配，没有语义理解。比如你问"怎么做缓存"，它找不到标题写着"Redis"的片段，因为"缓存"和"redis"在字符串上没有任何关联。这也是我之前提到可以用向量检索来升级的原因。
